Video.summary: Trina has a surprise for Larry; Edwin wants to end things with Sadee; Shamm and Nita.
Video.title: Thirsty For a Transsexual

Video.summary: Fists fly when Cee Cee proposes to her boyfriend on the show; old flames come out of the woodwork to profess their love for Summer; Jon confesses a shocking secret to the woman he wants to marry.
Video.title: Half-Baked Proposals

Video.summary: Jake is here because he says that he knew he was in love with his girlfriend Lindsey the first time she ever asked him for a side of cheese. Then Shaina says she's in love with not one but two beautiful girls.
Video.title: Surprise Proposals...And Punches

Video.summary: Tony is sleeping with his girlfriends best friend, Allen. Next Tammy’s fiancée, Ron, has no idea that she's been sleeping with her best friend, Autumn. Later Jan’s lovers, Russ and Ian, find out that Jan has yet another romantic interest in her life.
Video.title: I'm Having A Bi-Sexual Affair

Video.summary: Audrina is prepared to get to the bottom of rumors that her boyfriend slept with her strip-club co-worker; Ashley's husband wants her permission to have sex with other women; Stephanie's revelation may ruin her bond with her newfound sister.
Video.title: Stripper Slapfest

Video.summary: Joanne wants to have a threesome with her friend and the friend's boyfriend; Ron's girlfriend is insanely jealous for a reason; Jazmen confronts her boyfriend and a woman he has been sexting.
Video.title: Girlfriends Get Rolled

Video.summary: Percy must choose between his baby-mama and his other woman; Mary learns that her fiance has messed around with her friend; Casey wonders whether she should get back together with a man who constantly lies.
Video.title: Baby Daddy Deception

Video.summary: A man finds out his wife is having sex with their son-in-law; a man cheats with one of his girlfriend's best friends; a man suspects his girlfriend is cheating with his friend.
Video.title: A Dad, Tacos & the Kung Fu Kid

Image.alt: A Dad, Tacos & the Kung Fu Kid
A Dad, Tacos & the Kung Fu Kid
A Dad, Tacos & the Kung Fu Kid

Video.summary: Jordan admits that he has not been faithful to his girlfriend; Shay confesses that she has shared a lot with her best friend; Trisha learns that her fiance slept with her friend again.
Video.title: Bitter BFFs

Video.summary: Briget wants the rumors about her boyfriend's cheating to stop; Samantha says her best friend has turned into her worst enemy; Moniqua wants to get her ex-boyfriend's new baby-mama out of the picture.
Video.title: Fight Fest

Video.summary: Jen learns that her boyfriend hooked up with a stripper and someone else; Itzy's boyfriend cheated with her cousin Zuly; Ashley takes vengeance on the "friend" who wrecked her last relationship.
Video.title: Sex Junkies

Video.summary: Mr. Panama is back and still cannot decide which girl he wants to be with. Next Chauntey is a transsexual who’s cheating with her lover's brother! Later Chris is back and he's still trying to play Dee and Rhonda at the same time.
Video.title: Unforgettable Guests Return

Video.summary: Jamie has been stripping and cheating on her boyfriend with a woman! Then, Steve believes his wife’s been cheating with another man. Next LaToya's here to cause a family feud. She's been cheating with her girlfriend's sister!
Video.title: Hidden Affairs!

Video.summary: Tiffany wants to escalate things with her workout partner, but he has eyes for a woman who is hiding her true identity; Sammie says he offered a woman sex instead of money when he lost a bet to her; Brianna has feelings for her pool-playing buddy.
Video.title: Sexercise Me

Video.summary: Tempers flare when Belinda's husband finds out she's cheating, but he thinks it's his fault and asks for forgiveness. Next Twist will reveal a huge secret to his fiancee ... he is really a woman!
Video.title: Unforgivable Secrets!

Video.summary: Rich and Dreama, bribed Dreama's sister, Tabby, to have sex with them before they would baby-sit her children so she could go to work at her local go go club. Then Steve is tired of supporting his daughter, Christy, and her lazy boyfriend.
Video.title: Country Lovin'!

Video.summary: Rob hates his brother, Steve, and can't wait to tell him that he's sleeping with his fiancee and she's going home with him! Next Meg will make it clear to her boyfriend that she is serious about her unusual fantasy of having sex with clowns!
Video.title: Springer Scandals

Video.summary: Josh says his world was ruined once his girlfriend gave birth to their child, so he slept with her sister; Derrick wants to dump his boyfriend so that he can be single, free and able to do his own thing.
Video.title: Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me

Image.alt: Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me
Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me
Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me

Video.summary: Steven and Tekla say their daughter-in-law Jamie is their retirement fund. Then, Patricia will reveal to her mom who introduced her to hooking!
Video.title: I'm Pimping My Daughter

Video.summary: Tish finds bad news while snooping through her friend's cell phone; Kalia wants Victoria's boyfriend; CJ blames his wife for his infidelity.
Video.title: Selfie Destruction

Video.summary: Our cameras were at home with sisters Olivia and Catherine when Olivia confronted her older sister for sleeping with her boyfriend, Jacob. Next Jeromy has been having an affair with 2 sisters and both are now pregnant!
Video.title: Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man

Image.alt: Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man
Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man
Sisters Pregnant by the Same Man

Video.summary: Geeky Ben finally got with his dream girl and now wants to leave his girlfriend Brittany. Katie ended up sleeping with best friend Julie’s man on a camping trip, but he’s got his own secret. Tina took over her friend Leanne’s house and husband!
Video.title: I'm Leaving You For My Dream Girl

Image.alt: I'm Leaving You For My Dream Girl
I'm Leaving You For My Dream Girl
I'm Leaving You For My Dream Girl

Video.summary: A 17-year-old and her mother are prostitutes.
Video.title: Steve Confronts a 17-Year-Old Prostitute

Video.summary: Keema wants to propose to the father of her child; Eleni went through her boyfriend's cell phone and found revealing text messages from another woman; Mike wants to keep his family intact, but his baby's mother has a confession to make.
Video.title: Young Mom Meltdown

Video.summary: Barin's new girlfriend has a secret; Ericka disapproves of her sister's girlfriend; another man may ruin Tyler's wedding.
Video.title: My Big Gay Wedding

Video.summary: Jeff met Chrissy during a beer robbery, but he never imagined she’d be sexually aggressive! Now he wants out! Shawn has to come clean to his fiancée Latisha after his one night stand! Tyrell is over Jill and ready to be with her godsister, Nicky!
Video.title: You're Not Leaving Me!

Video.summary: Anthony found out he fathered Brittany’s son a year ago and now learns she’s a lesbian! Timmy tells Jaime he’s been dating Ashley online! Josh fights to get his baby mama Katie back from his best friend Nate!
Video.title: I'm A Lesbian and I'm Leaving

Image.alt: I'm A Lesbian and I'm Leaving
I'm A Lesbian and I'm Leaving
I'm A Lesbian and I'm Leaving

Video.summary: Bambi is a high-class call girl in the Los Angeles area who explains her life as a prostitute. Then Tiffany confronts their pimp C.T. about selling her for sex without her knowledge.
Video.title: High Class Call Girls

Video.summary: Gail needs more excitement in her life so shes been sleeping with her boyfriend's best friend! Next Dave finds out that his girlfriend of 3 years is having an affair. He says he's willing to do anything to get her back; even wear her bra!
Video.title: Freaky Sex Stories

Video.summary: Tia says she has proof that her brother-in-law cheats on her sister; Maranda wants to get back together with her ex-fiance but believes it could stir up problems with her best friend; Kaila wants a threesome.
Video.title: Man Snatching Sister

Video.summary: Kejana’s aunt Rose moved in with her and her man Dicoy. Dicoy ended up cheating with Rose! Can Ruben get Selena to leave his best friend Scott? Eddie had a fling with transsexual Chloe, but then his girlfriend’s father found out!
Video.title: Down and Dirty Affairs

Video.summary: Joe’s obsession with sex toys drove Bonnie to his friend Brent! Andy wants his ex Diane back, but she’s in love with someone else! Kelli’s husband Anthony has been cheating with their neighbor!
Video.title: My Husband Won't Have Sex With Me!

Image.alt: My Husband Won't Have Sex With Me!
My Husband Won't Have Sex With Me!
My Husband Won't Have Sex With Me!
